java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_CLOSE.name: SEG_CLOSE
signatures: static final int SEG_CLOSE
java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_CLOSE.description:
The segment type constant that specifies that
the preceding subpath should be closed by appending a line segment
back to the point corresponding to the most recent SEG_MOVETO.

info.excerpt:
The segment type constant that specifies that
the preceding subpath should be closed by appending a line segment
back to the point corresponding to the most recent SEG_MOVETO.

java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_CUBICTO.name: SEG_CUBICTO
signatures: static final int SEG_CUBICTO
java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_CUBICTO.description:
The segment type constant for the set of 3 points that specify
a cubic parametric curve to be drawn from the most recently
specified point.

info.excerpt:
The segment type constant for the set of 3 points that specify
a cubic parametric curve to be drawn from the most recently
specified point.

java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_LINETO.name: SEG_LINETO
signatures: static final int SEG_LINETO
java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_LINETO.description:
The segment type constant for a point that specifies the
end point of a line to be drawn from the most recently
specified point.

info.excerpt:
The segment type constant for a point that specifies the
end point of a line to be drawn from the most recently
specified point.

java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_MOVETO.name: SEG_MOVETO
signatures: static final int SEG_MOVETO
java.awt.geom/PathIterator/SEG_MOVETO.description:
The segment type constant for a point that specifies the
starting location for a new subpath.

info.excerpt:
The segment type constant for a point that specifies the
starting location for a new subpath.
